CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2014 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2014 Continued To Sep-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim
Off Calendar Jul-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Eric L. Toscano, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Virginia De Lourdes Canizalez, mother and guardian ad litem for Minors: Jeremiah Canizalez and Richard Antonio Canizalez; present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement for Minor: Jeremiah Canizalez: $9,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $2,250.00 payable to Toscano Kellogg & Van Aken LLP.
Other authorized disbursements payable directly to third parties in the total amount of: $829.92 Medi-Cal Department of Health Care Services Recovery Branch- MS 4720 P.O. Box 997421, Sacramento, CA 95899-7421
Total Allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment: $3,079.92
A net balance of $5,920.08 to be deposited into a blocked account at Bank of America, 3250 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA 94110 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on October 7, 2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim
Off Calendar Jul-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Eric L. Toscano, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Virginia De Lourdes Canizalez, mother and guardian ad litem for Minors: Jeremiah Canizalez and Richard Antonio Canizalez; present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement for Minor: Richard Antonio Canizalez: $7,500.00
Attorney's Fees: $1875.00 payable to Toscano Kellogg & Van Aken LLP.
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement of judgment: $1,875.00

A net balance of $5,625.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at Bank of America 3250 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA 94110 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on October 7, 2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
